zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT於1200年4月10日出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特提爾包格時，他的父親Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN30歲，母親Gertrudis VAN LANDEN30歲。他於大約1216年與Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen在荷蘭布拉班特提爾包格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1248年4月12日在他的家鄉享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT于1200年4月10日出生在荷兰努-布拉班特提爾包格时，他的父亲Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN30岁，母亲Gertrudis VAN LANDEN30岁。他于大约1216年与Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen在荷兰布拉班特提爾包格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1248年4月12日在他的家乡享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: BAC
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish (also Bać): perhaps a variant of Bacz, from a pet form of the personal name Bartłomiej (see Bartholomew ), occuring in southeastern Poland. Aternatively, it may be a metonymic occupational name derived from baca ‘shepherd’. Compare Batz .
French: from bac ‘tub, trough’, probably applied as a metonymic occupational name or as a topographic name.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

nameMeanings.name: TOT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Croatian, Slovenian, and Serbian; Rusyn and Slovak (from Vojvodina in Serbia): from Tot, an ethnic name of Hungarian origin (see Toth 1), denoting either a Croat of the Kajkavian language or a Slovenian or a Slovak living in the regions which were part of Hungary before WWI.
Amerindian (Guatemala): Mayan name, from a word denoting a snail.

variants.name: Toth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Zoltan, Tibor, Laszlo, Sandor, Bela, Geza, Attila, Gabor, Endre, Kalman, Andras, Jozsef.

Hungarian (Tóth): from an old spelling of tót, a Hungarian ethnic name for a Slovak or Slovenian, and also for a Croat speaking the Kajkavian language, which is very close to Slovenian. This surname is also found in Slovenia, Croatia, and Serbia, where it is more commonly spelled Tot (beside Toth and Tóth), and in Slovakia and Romania.
German: nickname from Middle High German tōt ‘death’.

nameMeanings.name: Woutersz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Laurent, Pascal.
Flemish, Dutch, and North German (Lower Rhine): patronymic from the personal name Wouter (see Walter ).

variants.name: Walter
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Wauters
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Henri, Jacques, Luc.
Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Wouters  .

variants.name: Weets
meanings: Flemish: patronymic from a personal name developed from Wouter, see Wouters .

en.lifeSummary: When Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT was born on 10 April 1200, in Tilburg, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN, was 30 and his mother, Gertrudis VAN LANDEN, was 30. He married Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen about 1216, in Tilburg, Brabant, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 12 April 1248, in his hometown, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT est né le 10 avril 1200, à Tilburg, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Gertrudis VAN LANDEN, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen environ 1216, à Tilburg, Brabant, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1248, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT am 10. April 1200 in Tilburg, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN 30 und seine Mutter Gertrudis VAN LANDEN 30. Er hat um 1216 in Tilburg, Brabant, Niederlande Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 12. April 1248 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT è nato il il 10 aprile 1200 nel Tilburg, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Gertrudis VAN LANDEN, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen circa 1216, nel Tilburg, Brabant, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 aprile 1248, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOTが1200年4月10日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントティルブルグで生まれた時，父Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLENは30歳，母Gertrudis VAN LANDENは30歳であった。約1216年にオランダブラバントティルブルグでCountess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1248年4月12日に故郷で48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT(이)가 1200년 4월 10일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 틸버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrudis VAN LANDEN(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1216년 네덜란드 브라반트 틸버그에서 Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1248년 4월 12일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT nasceu em 10 de abril de 1200, em Tilburg, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Gertrudis VAN LANDEN, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen aproximadamente 1216, em Tilburg, Brabant, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1248, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnoldus Woutersz BAC TOT BAESCOT родился 10 апреля 1200 г. в местности тилбург, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Walterus Arnt BAC VAN OLEN было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrudis VAN LANDEN, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Agnes Waltherus Berthout van Mechelen Keerbergen около 1216 г. в местности тилбург, брабант, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 12 апреля 1248 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет.
